query:
SELECT TOP 20000
        gs.source_id,
        gs.ra,
        gs.dec,
        gs.l,
        gs.b,
        gs.parallax,
        gs.parallax_error,
        gs.phot_g_mean_mag,
        gs.bp_rp,
        gs.ruwe,
        gs.ag_gspphot
    FROM gaiadr3.vari_summary AS vs
    JOIN gaiadr3.gaia_source AS gs
        ON vs.source_id = gs.source_id
    WHERE 
        gs.parallax > 0
        AND gs.parallax_error IS NOT NULL
        AND gs.parallax / gs.parallax_error >= 5.0
        AND gs.bp_rp IS NOT NULL
        AND gs.phot_g_mean_mag IS NOT NULL
        AND gs.ruwe IS NOT NULL
        AND gs.ruwe < 1.4
